items.title: US and Iran reach tentative deal to extend ceasefire, US officials say
items.summary: But there has been conflicting information from Tehran, with one news agency reporting that no deal has been finalised or confirmed.

items.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.

items.title: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
items.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
